title: Fresh Gooey Romantic Uruguayan Rice Noodle Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly dish features fresh brown rice noodles stir-fried with a combination of aromatic vegetables and creamy avocado dressing for a delightful twist on traditional uruguayan cuisine.
instructions: Boil the brown rice noodles according to package instructions.
In a skillet, heat olive oil and sauté garlic until fragrant.
Add carrots and bell peppers; stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until vegetables are tender but still crisp.
Drain the cooked rice noodles and add them to the skillet with vegetables. Mix well.
Fold in diced avocado, lime juice, and low-fat mayonnaise. Toss gently to combine.
Finish by sprinkling fresh cilantro leaves if available.
